title: PARENT EDUCATION - 211info
text: FAMILY NURTURING CENTER JACKSON COUNTY PARENT EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a way for parents and caregivers to learn discipline strategies and stregthen parent and child interactions. Provides a variety of services for children and their caregivers, including therapeutic early childhood education, home visits, parent education, respite care, and basic needs support. 825 E Main Street Suite A Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Varies by class Email (541) 779-5242 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-5242 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of 5th Avenue and N Oakdale Avenue Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Financial Literacy Training GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction In Person Support Groups * Foster Parents Parent Support Groups * Kinship Caregivers Parent/Child Activity Groups Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RELIEF NURSERY MATERIAL GOODS - DIAPERS MATERIAL GOODS - LITTLE SPROUTS CLOTHING SWAP SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - TODDLER TUMMY TIME PLAYGROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
